name: 12L + Catalytic Residuals + BigramHash(10240) + SWA + Late QAT
blurb: 12 layers with Catalytic Residual Connections (learned per-dimension residual gain, -0.024 bpb at zero overhead). BigramHash 10240 buckets. SWA start_frac=0.2. Late QAT (STE int6 in final 4%). Int6+zstd quantization. Sliding window eval stride=64. Mean of 3 seeds: 1.14662 (std 0.00071). Built on PR #180 standard stack.
author: zacharygoldfine
